    "formula": "Binary number system where only one bit changes between consecutive numbers",

    "name": "ASCII Code Conversion",
    "formula": "A = 65, B = 66, C = 67, ..., Z = 90, a = 97, b = 98, c = 99, ..., z = 122",
    "variables": "A-Z, a-z, 0-9, and special characters",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert ASCII codes to characters and vice versa"
  },
  {
    "name": "Binary to Decimal Conversion",
    "formula": "Decimal = (bit7 * 2^6) + (bit6 * 2^5) + ... + (bit0 * 2^0)",
    "variables": "bit0, bit1, ..., bit7",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert binary numbers to decimal numbers"
  },
  {
    "name": "Decimal to Binary Conversion",
    "formula": "bit7 = decimal // 2^6, bit6 = (decimal % 2^6) // 2^5, ..., bit0 = decimal % 2^0",
    "variables": "decimal",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert decimal numbers to binary numbers"
  },
  {
    "name": "Binary to Octal Conversion",
    "formula": "Octal = (bit7 * 8^1) + (bit6 * 8^0), (bit5 * 8^1) + (bit4 * 8^0), ..., (bit0 * 8^0)",
    "variables": "bit0, bit1, ..., bit7",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert binary numbers to octal numbers"
  },
  {
    "name": "Octal to Binary Conversion",
    "formula": "bit7 = Octal // 8, bit6 = (Octal % 8) // 1, ..., bit0 = Octal % 1",
    "variables": "Octal",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert octal numbers to binary numbers"
  },
  {
    "name": "Binary to Hexadecimal Conversion",
    "formula": "Hexadecimal = (bit7 * 16^1) + (bit6 * 16^0), (bit5 * 16^1) + (bit4 * 16^0), ..., (bit0 * 16^0)",
    "variables": "bit0, bit1, ..., bit7",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert binary numbers to hexadecimal numbers"
  },
  {
    "name": "Hexadecimal to Binary Conversion",
    "formula": "bit7 = Hexadecimal // 16, bit6 = (Hexadecimal % 16) // 1, ..., bit0 = Hexadecimal % 1",
    "variables": "Hexadecimal",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert hexadecimal numbers to binary numbers"
  },
  {
    "name": "ASCII to Text Conversion",
    "formula": "Characters = ASCII codes",
    "variables": "ASCII codes",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert ASCII codes to text"
  },
  {
    "name": "Text to ASCII Conversion",
    "formula": "ASCII codes = Characters",
    "variables": "Characters",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Used to convert text to ASCII codes"
  }
